name: authportal
tagline: A customizable authentication portal for managing user access and self-service flows
description: Auth Portal is a customizable authentication portal for Kubernetes clusters and reverse proxies, allowing self-registration, password resets, and user management via UI or API.

features.title: Access Control
features.description: Customizable auth gateway for Kubernetes and proxies. Flexible access control

features.title: Password Management
features.description: Users can reset passwords independently. Self-service security

features.title: User Management
features.description: Admin interface for account administration. Centralized control

features.title: Kubernetes Ready
features.description: Native support for K8s clusters. Cloud-native
